# Prep DELE C2

## About
Prep DELE C2 is an iOS app for practicing the DELE C2 exam (Diploma de Español como Lengua Extranjera, level C2 — mastery). It provides full practice exams following the official Instituto Cervantes format.

## App Details
- Platform: iOS (iPhone)
- Price: Free with optional premium subscription
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id0000000000

## Exam Coverage
The app covers all 3 tests of the DELE C2:
- Test 1: Use of language, reading and listening comprehension (105 min, 6 tasks)
- Test 2: Integrated skills — listening/reading comprehension + written expression (150 min, 3 tasks)
- Test 3: Integrated skills — reading comprehension + oral expression (20 min + 30 min prep)

## Features
- Full practice exams in official format
- Professional audio for listening comprehension
- Progress tracking by test and task
- Detailed explanations for answers

- Homepage (Spanish): https://C2.prepdele.com/
- Homepage (English): https://C2.prepdele.com/en/

- Blog (English): https://C2.prepdele.com/en/blog/
- Sample Exam: https://C2.prepdele.com/modelo-examen/
- Support: https://C2.prepdele.com/support/

## Contact
- Email: hello@prepdele.com

## Important
Prep DELE C2 is an independent app. It is not affiliated with Instituto Cervantes or Spain's Ministry of Education.
